member.name: P:GTA.Vehicle.IsConsideredDestroyed

summary.para:
Gets or sets a value indicating whether this
is considered destroyed. Will be set to
when
s are exploded or sinking for a short time.

will return
and
will return
if this value is set to
. Does not affect if this
will rendered scorched.

member.remarks:
Many features of
will be disabled when this value is set to
. For example,
s cannot enter
s considered destroyed or start the engines of them.
s cannot use weapons of them. The player cannot unflip
s considered destroyed.
